title: lepidium montanum var. jonesii
intro: Lepidium montanum var. jonesii, also known as Mountain Peppergrass or Jones' Peppergrass, is a variety of wild mustard native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Lepidium montanum var. jonesii is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating colds and coughs, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and its seeds and leaves can be dried or used fresh in various herbal preparations.
